title: Rectorate Common Courses 2025-2026 Spring Term Midterm Dates/Times
content:
Rectorate Common Courses 2025-2026 Spring Term Midterm Dates/Times

The midterm exams for the 2025-2026 Spring Semester Rectorate Common Courses are scheduled to be held on Tuesday and Wednesday,

, between 17:30 and 19:20. As per regulations, the midterm exams will be administered in classrooms with invigilators, just like other courses. You will be able to find out which campus and classroom you will be taking the exam in, as well as the exam rules, by checking the announcements that will be made on

STIX

one week before the exam. Students must take the exam in the classroom where their name and student number are located. Therefore,

be sure to find out

your assigned campus and classroom before the exam.

We wish you success.
